zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Peverell於1325年出生時，他的父親Sir Hugh Peverell18歲，母親Elizabeth Cobham24歲。他於1379年與Margaret de Courtenay在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1390年在英國可瓦爾被列為high sheriff 。他去世於1403年10月17日之前在英國英格蘭可瓦爾海爾 白 聖 奧斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Peverell于1325年出生时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Peverell18岁，母亲Elizabeth Cobham24岁。他于1379年与Margaret de Courtenay在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1390年在英国可瓦爾被列为high sheriff 。他去世于1403年10月17日之前在英国英格兰可瓦爾海爾 白 聖 奧斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Peverell was born in 1325, his father, Sir Hugh Peverell, was 18 and his mother, Elizabeth Cobham, was 24. He married Margaret de Courtenay in 1379, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1390, at the age of 65, his occupation is listed as high sheriff  in Cornwall, England. He died before 17 October 1403, in Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Peverell est né en 1325, son père, Sir Hugh Peverell, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cobham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Courtenay en 1379, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1390, à l’âge de 65 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff  à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 17 octobre 1403, à Penhale by St Austell, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Peverell 1325 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Peverell 18 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cobham 24. Er hat 1379 in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1390, als er 65 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff  in Cornwall, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 17. Oktober 1403 in Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Peverell è nato il nel 1325, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Peverell, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cobham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Courtenay nel 1379, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1390, all'età di 65 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff  nel Cornwall, England. Morì prima del 17 ottobre 1403, nel Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Peverellが1325年に生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Peverellは18歳，母Elizabeth Cobhamは24歳であった。1379年にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターでMargaret de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1390年，65歳の時，イギリスコルンワルでの職業はhigh sheriff と記録されている。彼は1403年10月17日以前にイギリスイギリスコルンワルペンヘイル ビー スト アウステルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Peverell(이)가 1325년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Peverell(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cobham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 Margaret de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1390년, 65세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 코른월에서 high sheriff 이었다. 그는 1403년 10월 17일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 펜할 비 스트 오스텔에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Peverell nasceu em 1325, seu pai, Sir Hugh Peverell, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cobham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Courtenay em 1379, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1390, com 65 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff  em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 17 de outubro de 1403, em Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Peverell родился в 1325 г., его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Peverell было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cobham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Courtenay в 1379 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1390 году, в возрасте 65 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff  в местности корнвалл, Англия. Он умер перед 17 октябрь 1403 г. в местности пенэл би ст аустелл, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Peverell nació en 1325, su papá, Sir Hugh Peverell, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cobham, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret de Courtenay en 1379, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1390, a la edad de 65 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff  en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 17 de octubre de 1403, en Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
